title: microlepia rhomboidea
intro: Microlepia rhomboidea is a species of fern native to tropical Asia, commonly found in countries such as India and Sri Lanka. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Microlepia rhomboidea include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as a tea or decoction, and also used in the form of a paste or powder to be applied topically for wound healing and skin care.
